KB_START.text: Main Menu: Please choose your symptom type

BRANCH_A.text: Branch A: Choose the description that best fits your condition

options.label: Red patches, painful joints, pitted nails, or dandruff
Blackheads/whiteheads, oily skin, pimples or cysts

A_PSORIASIS_CHECK.text: Detailed Check: Do the patches develop white-silvery scales and stiffness?

options.label: No, it's more of oozing blisters

BRANCH_B.text: Branch B: Choose the symptoms you are experiencing with fever

options.label: Severe headache, stiff neck, and confusion
Cough, runny nose, and spreading itchy rash

MENINGITIS_CHECK.text: Urgent Check: Do you have a stiff neck along with the headache and rash?

MEASLES_SCARLET_CHECK.text: Infection Check: Do you have grayish bumps in the mouth (Koplik spots)?

options.label: Red, painful lump following an insect bite
Firm round lumps with rough surface and black dots

Psoriasis.text: Do you notice silvery-white scales on the red patches?
Do you experience any stiffness or pain in your joints?
Are there any pits or changes in your fingernails or toenails?

Eczema.text: Is the itching intense, especially at night?
Do the blisters ooze fluid or crust over when scratched?
Does the skin feel thick or leathery in the affected areas?

Acne.text: Is your skin notably oily, especially in the T-zone?
Do you have deep, painful lumps (cysts) under the skin?

Ichthyosis.text: Is the skin extremely dry and covered in small, scale-like patterns?
Has this condition been present since very early childhood?

Meningitis.text: Is it very difficult or painful to touch your chin to your chest?
Does bright light hurt your eyes?

Measles.text: Are there tiny white/gray spots inside your cheeks?
Do you have a persistent dry cough and red, watery eyes?

Scarlet Fever.text: Does your tongue look red and bumpy (strawberry tongue)?
Does the rash feel rough like sandpaper?

Insect Bite.text: Did the redness and swelling appear suddenly after being outdoors?
Is there a visible puncture mark or stinger in the center?

Warts.text: Is the surface of the lump rough and grainy to the touch?
Can you see tiny black dots (clotted blood vessels) inside the lump?
